training_status: recreational lifter, 3-4x/week resistance training, no cardio

benefits.description: Lost approximately 50 lbs over 4-5 months, going from ~226 lbs to 175 lbs
Semaglutide made it much easier to manage caloric intake
Body composition scan puts user around 15% body fat; achieved visible 4-pack abs never seen before; muscle wasting offset by resistance training

protocol_notes: Started at 0.25 mg/week, titrated up to 0.5 mg/week after 2 weeks (faster than standard 4-week titration schedule). Never exceeded 0.5 mg/week. Also mentioned prior testosterone replacement therapy at a men's clinic (120 mg test referenced by a commenter). B12, COQ10, and D3 injections mentioned from prior TRT clinic experience. Start date September 23, 2023; progress photo January 27, 2024.
